fixes.origin:
os.environ["ECHO_VALUE"] = v.strip()

chain = ["cmd.exe", "/c", "echo %ECHO_VALUE%"]
proc = subprocess.run(chain, capture_output=True, encoding="utf-8")
fixes.replacement:
value = v.strip()
proc = subprocess.CompletedProcess(args=["echo"], returncode=0, stdout=(value + "\n"), stderr="")
